children.name: nqaAdminParaExtTable
children.description:
Description: Objects in this table are used in pairs. In each pair, the first object is read-only. After the test instance type is specified, the system automatically fills the character string. Its content is the description of the second object, so that the user can learn the description and value range of the second object. The second object is a configurable NQA parameter. Test instances have different descriptions and values. After the test instance type is specified, the user can obtain the information from the first object. The values of the first 15 pairs of objects in this table are numbers, and those of the last 10 pairs of objects are character strings.
Creation restrictions: None
Modification restrictions: None
Deletion restrictions: None
Access restrictions: None

children.name: nqaMultiPathHistoryTable
children.description:
Defines the Remote Operations test History Table for
                storing the results of a test operation.

children.name: nqaMtracertHistoryTable
children.description:
Defines the Remote MtracertOperations test History Table for
                storing the results of a test operation.

children.name: nqaResultsTable
children.description:
Description: This table describes result information of a test instance.
Creation restrictions: No entry can be created in this table.
Modification restrictions: The entries in this table cannot be modified.
Deletion restrictions: The entries in this table cannot be deleted.
Access restrictions: The entries in this table can be accessed only when the following conditions are met.
A GET operation is performed.
The test instance type must be ICMP, UDP, or TCP.
The nqaResultsIndex and nqaResultsHopIndex values must be 0.

children.name: nqaGeneralflowStatsTable
children.description:
Defines the test Results Extend Table for testing throughput of network.
                  The results of these operations are stored in the nqaGeneralflowStatsTable.

children.name: nqaPathMtuStatsTable
children.description:
The statistics collection database.
                 Defines the path MTU Operations Statistics Table for
                 storing the statistics of a path MTU test.

children.name: nqaHTTPStatsTable
children.description:
The statistics collection database.
                 Defines the HTTP Operations Statistics Table for
          storing the statistics of a HTTP test.

children.name: nqaPppoeStatsTable
children.description: A table which contains the rolling accumulated history of the PPPoE operation.

children.name: nqaPppoeStatsEntry
children.description:
A table which contains the rolling accumulated history of the PPPoE operation.
       This entry is created only if the nqaAdminCtrlType is pppoe.

children.name: nqaPppoeClientSessionId
children.description: The client sessionID of PPPoE operation.

children.name: nqaIcmpServerTable
children.description:
Description: This table describes how to configure the NQA ICMP service of the server, such as configuring a server, IP address, and VRF.
Creation restrictions
The entries in this table can be created only when the indexes nqaIcmpServerAddress and nqaUdpServerVrfName are specified.
The nqaIcmpServerAddressType index value must be ipv4(1).
The nqaIcmpServerStatus index value must be CreateAndGo (4).

Modification restrictions: The entries in this table cannot be modified.

Deletion restrictions
The entries in this table can be deleted. Indexes must be specified.
The nqaIcmpServerStatus index value must be 6(Destroy).

Access restrictions
If the nqaIcmpServerStatus value returned is active(1), the ICMP server is running. If the nqaIcmpServerStatus value returned is notInService(2), the ICMP server has stopped running.

children.name: nqaIcmpServerEntry
children.description:
A table which contains the status of nqa ICMP server 
                configuration information.
 
                This entry is included the ICMP server IP address.
                If used for VPN it is also included the VPN name.

children.name: nqaIcmpServerAddressType
children.description: Specifies the address type of ICMP server.

children.name: nqaReflectorTable
children.description:
Description: nqaReflectorTable describes how to configure an NQA reflector.
Creation restrictions: None
Modification restrictions: This table is generated after a reflector is created. The entries in this table can be modified when nqaReflectorID is specified.
The reflector cannot be modified after being created.
Deletion restrictions: None
Access restrictions: None

children.name: nqaAlarmTable
children.description: A list of alarm entries.

children.name: nqaEventTable
children.description: A list of events to be generated.

children.name: nqaEventEntry
children.description: A set of parameters that describe an event to be generated when certain conditions are met.

children.name: nqaEventType
children.description:
Event type, that is, behaviors for processing events:
                                  none(1): no behavior
                                  log(2): keeping logs
                                  trap(3): sending trap messages
                                  logandtrap(4): keeping logs and sending trap messages
                                  linkage(5): start the linkaged test-instance.

children.name: nqaEventOperationTag
children.description: Operation tag of event test instance.

children.name: nqaJitterCollectStatsTable
children.description: A table which contains the rolling accumulated history of the Jitter operation.

children.name: nqaTestFlowTable
children.description: A table of NQA testflow definitions.

children.name: nqaTestFlowEntry
children.description: Defines an entry in the nqaTestFlowTable.

children.name: nqaTestFlowDstIPAddrType
children.description: This object indicates the type of destination IP address.

children.name: nqaTestFlowSrcIPModifierMask
children.description: This object specifies the IP address modifier bits of value that applied to add the step value.

children.name: nqaTestFlowCir
children.description: This object indicates value of Committed Information Rate.

children.name: nqaTestFlowEndUdpSrcPort
children.description: This object indicates the end of UDP source port.

children.name: nqaTestFlowPevid
children.description: This object indicates the PE VLAN ID.

children.name: nqaTestFlowYellowEndValue
children.description: This object indicates the end of priority value of Yellow.

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordEnable
children.description:
Identifies whether saving test results to the FTP server through FTP is enabled.
enable(1)
disable(2)
By default, the value is disable(2).

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordIpAddr
children.description: Set the IP address of the FTP server to which test results are saved.

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordVrfName
children.description: Set the name of the VRF instance for the FTP server to which test results are saved.

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordFileName
children.description: Set the file name of used by the FTP server to save test results.

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordNotificationEnable
children.description:
Set whether to send trap messages when saving test results to the FTP server is completed.
                        By default, the value is disable(2).

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordLastFileName
children.description: Set the name of the file used to save the last test record to the FTP server.

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordUserName
children.description: Set the user name of the FTP server to which test results are saved.

children.name: nqaFtpSaveRecordItemNum
children.description: The value of this object identifies the number of NQA test results that can be saved in a file created on the FTP server. The default value is 100000.

children.name: nqaNumOfCurrentCtrlEntry
children.description: The total number of current configuration tests.

children.name: nqaJitterVersion
children.description:
Selects the version of jitter test. 
                (The value range: old version:1, new version:2. The default value is old version(1))

children.name: nqaRtptcpMaxConcurrentNumber
children.description: The maximum number of concurrent active rtp-tcp servers.

children.name: nqaSupportServerType
children.description:
Test type that the current device supports.
             Data structure of the type is in the format of bits. 
             Each bit represents a test type. 
             tcpServer(0),
             udpServer(1),
             icmpServer(2),
             rtpudpServer(3),
             rtptcpServer(4)
             The value #0x00 indicates don't support all servertypes.

children.name: nqaSupportTestType
children.description:
Test type that the current device supports.
                Data structure of the type is in the format of bits. 
                Each bit represents a test type. 
                The mappings between bits and tests are as follows:
                icmp(0),
                tcp(1),
                udp(2),
                http(3),
                ftp(4),
                jitter(5),
                snmp(6),
                trace(7),
                lspPing(8),
                lspTrace(9),
                dns(10),
                dhcp(11),
                dlsw(12),
                pwe3Ping(13),
                pwe3Trace(14),
                mPing(15),
                mTrace(16),
                macPing(17),
                macTunnelPing(18),
                lspJitter(19),
                icmpJitter(20),
                pathJitter(21),
                pathMtu(22),
                pppoe(23),
                vplsmPing(24),
                vplsmacPing(25),
                vplsmacTrace(26),
                vplsMTrace(27),
                gmacping(28),
                gmactrace(29),
                mactrace(30),
                vplspwping(31),
                vplspwtrace(32),
                rtptest(36),
                rtpsnoop(37),
                generalflow(38),
                ethernetService(39)
The value #0x00 indicates don't support all testtypes.

children.name: nqaMaxNumOfRequests
children.description:
The maximum number of requests
                 that are allowed within an agent implementation.

children.name: nqaVersion
children.description:
The NQA version (for example, 1.1). 
                It can be used for version management.

children.name: nqaMaxConcurrentRequests
children.description:
The maximum number of concurrent active requests
                 that are allowed within an agent implementation.

children.name: nqaEnable
children.description:
Indicates the switch of enabling NQA client.
                 (The value range: enable:1; disable:2. The default value is enable(1))

children.name: nqaLastSetError
children.description:
The last configuration error.
                (0 indicates that the configuration does not fail).

children.name: nqaTimeOfLastSetError
children.description:
The time of the last configuration error. 
                (0 indicates that the configuration does not fail).

children.name: nqaRtpudpMaxConcurrentNumber
children.description: The maximum number of concurrent active rtp-udp servers.

children.name: nqaRtptestMaxConcurrentNumber
children.description: The maximum number of concurrent active rtptest requests that are allowed within an agent implementation.
